opinion.h: FORE v. TOTH. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 740. Decided April 20, 1959.
opinion.p: Maurice F. Hanning and J. King Rosendale for appellant.
Jack P. F. Gremillion, Attorney General of Louisiana, filed a brief for the State of Louisiana, as amicus curiae, in support of appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
359 U.S. 313 RILEY v. NEW JERSEY. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 659, Misc. Decided April 20, 1959.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for certiorari, certiorari is denied.
